message:
fix: memory leaks and thread safety in tmux API handlers

- percentDecode: free buf on append/toOwnedSlice failure instead of leaking
- handleTmuxListPanes: free buf on toOwnedSlice failure and on empty-list path
- handleTmuxDisplayMessage: hold mutex for entire function to avoid reading
  Panel pointer fields after unlock (use-after-free if panel freed by another thread)
- split-window: read parent panel fields inside lock scope with defer unlock,
  re-lookup panel inside lock instead of using stale pointer after unlock
